arts.ttl: Alan Shearer making Marcus Rashford stance clear – 'I wouldn’t change what I’ve said'
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has received criticism from former professional pundits in recent times, with Alan Shearer among those to hit out at the Manchester United star as of late

arts.ttl: Jadon Sancho has last laugh after ignoring brutal Jamie Carragher warning
arts.sum: Jadon Sancho enjoyed an impressive debut for Chelsea after joining them on deadline day but Sky Sports pundit Jamie Carragher has questioned why any player would join the Blues

arts.ttl: Manchester United's EA FC 25 player ratings revealed as Kobbie Mainoo given incredible upgrade
arts.sum: The EA FC 25 player ratings for Man United have been revealed, with the new game set to be released worldwide on Friday, September 27.

arts.ttl: Adrien Rabiot agrees next move after months of Man Utd links
arts.sum: Manchester United, who are long-term admirers of Rabiot, were once again heavily linked with the midfielder, but it is Marseille who have won the race for his signature pending a medical. Rabiot has been a free agent since his Juventus contract expired in the summer and was in no rush to agree to his next move, happy to wait until the transfer window had closed to find the best offer available.

arts.ttl: Michael Owen names player who could be Manchester United's 'most impressive' summer signing
arts.sum: One of Man United's new recruits has caught Michael Owen's eye already.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer doubles down on Marcus Rashford stance - 'I wouldn't change what I've said'
arts.sum: Alan Shearer has noted how he "wouldn't change anything" about his recent criticism of Manchester United Marcus Rashford, despite the 26-year-old netting at the weekend against Southampton

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Haaland wants Man City exit; Man Utd & Liverpool eye Adeyemi
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are ready to step up contract talks with Man City target Jamal Musiala, despite admitting it will be difficult to reach an agreement with the 21-year-old. Borussia Dortmund are ready to cash in on forward Karim Adeyemi, with Liverpool, Man Utd and Newcastle United all prepared to make big offers for the Germany international.

arts.ttl: ‘Gulf in class’ – Manchester United vs Barnsley prediction: The72
arts.sum: Barnsley head to Old Trafford to take on Manchester United on Tuesday night in the latest round of… The post ‘Gulf in class’ – Manchester United vs Barnsley prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: 'I'm an ex-Man Utd star – Wrexham's success pains me but Ryan Reynolds is doing great'
arts.sum: Wrexham have flourished since being taken over by actors Ryan Reynolds and Rob McElhenney with the club now currently sitting top of League One following successive promotions

arts.ttl: Sports Mole's Premier League Team of the Week: Haaland, Gabriel, De Ligt
arts.sum: Sports Mole selects its Premier League Team of the Week, including Erling Haaland, Gabriel Magalhaes and Matthijs de Ligt.
